import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let first = io.read_line()
  let p = match first
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    Ok(())
    return Ok(())
  end

  mut running = true
  while running
    let opt = io.read_line()
    match opt
    when Some(line)
      if string.starts_with(line, p)
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end

  Ok(())
end
